name: Create Partner BMO offer successfully

steps.name: Given the Draft Conditional Offer API is available
When I create a Partner BMO offer using "PartnerBMO_Offer.json"
Then the response status code should be 201
And the response should contain offerId
And the response should contain offerCode
And the response status should be "Draft"

fullName: Draft Conditional Offer API: Create Partner BMO offer successfully
